summary: Tested Enhanced AI booking features for ZONT VTC platform. All frontend tests passed: AI block with mic button visible, complete text fills all 4 form fields, incomplete text triggers guided mode, guided mode cycles through pickup->dropoff->date->time, quick suggestion buttons work, custom text input with OK button and Enter key work, mobile responsive at 390px width, all data-testid attributes present.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced AI booking features fully tested. New features: 1) Mic button (data-testid='ai-mic-btn') inside AI input field for voice input using Web Speech API - button exists and is clickable but actual voice recording cannot be tested in headless browser. 2) Guided mode (data-testid='guided-mode') triggers when AI cannot parse all fields - shows one question at a time with quick suggestion buttons (guided-btn-0 through guided-btn-3) and custom text input (guided-input) with OK button (guided-submit). 3) Guided mode cycles through: pickup (Paris CDG, Paris Orly, Nice Airport, Lyon Airport) -> dropoff (Paris Center, Disneyland, Tour Eiffel, Hotel) -> date (Today, Tomorrow) -> time (Morning 9h, Afternoon 14h, Evening 19h). 4) After completing all 4 steps, guided mode disappears and toast shows 'Form complete!'. 5) Enter key works in guided input field. 6) Mobile responsive at 390px - buttons wrap correctly.
